rationale: The cited 2002 paper is used repeatedly in the citing paper's framing of actual versus hypothetical WTP measurement and as prior empirical evidence on BDM performance. The authors explicitly say their BDM treatment was implemented in a way similar to Wertenbroch and Skiera (2002), showing direct methodological carryover. They then position their own contribution as adding additional methods and a REAL purchase benchmark beyond earlier BDM-versus-hypothetical comparisons.
relation_description: The citing paper extends Wertenbroch and Skiera's BDM-based WTP measurement line by reusing a similar BDM implementation and embedding it in a broader five-way empirical comparison (OE, CBC, BDM, ICBC, REAL). It expands the earlier work from method validation to comparative performance on demand estimation and pricing decision outcomes.
